caption: Solved IPC 2023 Learning Track tasks for one classical planner baseline and three frontier models, using the Sum (360) totals from the paper's standard and obfuscated benchmark tables.

source.notes: Standard totals come from Table 1 and obfuscated totals come from Table 2 in Frontier Large Language Models Rival State-of-the-Art Planners.

title: Planning benchmark coverage drops under symbol obfuscation
transformations: Selected one classical planner baseline and three frontier models from the paper's full tables.
Paired the Sum (360) totals from the standard and obfuscated benchmark settings.
Retained the planner's identical totals across both settings because the source states obfuscation does not affect classical planners.
